## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11 64-bit / Ubuntu 24.04 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.5 |
| PK232PY version | e.g. 0.1.0 |
| TNC model | e.g. AEA PK-232MBX |
| TNC firmware | e.g. v7.1 (Release 13-09-95) |
| Serial port | e.g. COM3 / /dev/ttyUSB0 |
| Baud rate | e.g. 9600 |

## Error Message / Traceback

```
Paste the full error message or traceback here
```

## Additional Context

Any other information that might be helpful.
